title: China's imports are surging
summary:
Main
China's agricultural import orders for the second half of the year are surging. The upshot to food uncertainty, for global markets anyway, is that China is importing more agricultural goods than ever. Purchases of soybeans, wheat, sorghum and corn are all up.
